thanks.aboutDesc: "Dialects Atlas" is an online tool focused on Middle Chinese position analysis, dialect comparison, and geolinguistics, dedicated to presenting the phonological layers and phonemic distributions of various dialect points in a clear and interactive manner.
thanks.feature1: Feature 1: Middle Chinese Search (organize readings by Middle Chinese position). Users can input various combinations for analysis, currently supporting categories such as rhyme group, rhyme, grade, division, tone, series, group, initial, voicing, place of articulation, manner of articulation, etc. The website will analyze initials/finals/tones based on the input combinations and present the results in tables and maps.
thanks.feature2: Feature 2: Phoneme Search (analyze Middle Chinese origins of phonemes). Users can input the above categories, and the website will analyze the Middle Chinese origins of the input phonetic values (phonemes) and present the results in tables and maps.
thanks.feature3: Feature 3: Tone Search (query tone values and categories). The website will organize tone values and categories based on the user's selected region and location, with different tone categories marked in different colors.
thanks.feature4: Feature 4: Character Search (query character pronunciation and position). Query based on user-input Chinese characters, ultimately presenting the phonetic values, annotations, and Middle Chinese positions of characters at various locations.
thanks.feature5: Feature 5: Regional Mapping (draw dialect maps by atlas regions/phonetic dictionary regions).
thanks.feature6: Feature 6: Custom Mapping (users add personal data for mapping). Users can select points and annotate on the map themselves, and the website will automatically assign colors based on feature values.
thanks.feature7: Blue text in tables (positions, phonetic values, etc.) are generally clickable. After clicking, a detailed query will be performed in a new popup, making it easy to compare and analyze with the original results.
thanks.feature8: Points on the map can also be clicked to query detailed information.
thanks.welcomeText: Welcome to explore "Dialects Atlas" and touch the historical layers of dialects together!
thanks.devPara1: Initially, I just wanted to create a handy tool for my own research, but unknowingly, I explored a vast universe. From the first line of code to the first feature, from naive ideas to a gradually enriched system, day and night alternating at the keyboard, my vision gradually took root from nothingness. Watching this website is like watching my own child learning to walk, step by step forming its own outline. Every button, every interaction, is imprinted with a period of time. I was exhausted trying to implement the desired query logic, and I was also delighted when the visual effects were successfully presented—these bits and pieces have become her blood and flesh, soul and spirit.
thanks.devPara2: In fact, this is also a journey of self-transformation. From knowing nothing about front-end development, to exploring DOM, trying virtual scrolling, advancing to using frameworks, and even appreciating the subtleties of JWT and ORM. I learned while building, matured through mistakes. The most fascinating part is that the bricks I used to build all this are the knowledge I longed to learn: building the website deepened my understanding of phonology, and studying phonology drove the iteration of code. Technology is no longer cold commands to me, but a vessel carrying culture; culture is no longer distant literature to me, gradually becoming an interactive, traceable, and touchable entity.
thanks.devPara3: This is my answer written with code and passion, a sincere gift from an ordinary student to the field of dialects. Thank you to everyone who encounters it. I hope this still immature creation can stir a ripple of curiosity in your heart, or save you a moment of time searching through materials—this is the meaning of her existence.
thanks.devPara4:
May the dialects from all directions live on forever;
May the beauty of Chinese characters be cherished forever;
May the flame of civilization endure in every interaction and resonance.
thanks.mcpdictDesc: Most of the data on this website comes from
thanks.testersDesc: Netizens who tested and provided suggestions before the official launch!
thanks.friendsDesc: All friends who supported, encouraged, and helped me during the project development!
thanks.youDesc: And of course, you who are reading this!

likeAuthor.buildRepo: Character table preprocessing repository - Extract initials, finals, and tones from character tables
likeAuthor.villagesMLRepo: Village Machine Learning - Village name and geographic data analysis
likeAuthor.supportText: "If the website is helpful to you, you can buy the author a coffee☕️. Your support will be the motivation for the author to continue maintaining🙏"
likeAuthor.supportNote: "Note: This site is developed and operated by an undergraduate student. From character table processing, backend API to frontend interface, all completed by one person; the expenses for servers and domain names are also saved from living expenses💸"
